task_completion.visual_evidence: Spreadsheet application (like Excel or LibreOffice Calc) is open displaying the 'call_center_kpis.xlsx' file.

task_completion.description: Calculate Service Level %, AHT, and Occupancy % on the 'Interval_Data' sheet
task_completion.visual_evidence: On the 'Interval_Data' sheet, new columns or filled cells exist for Service Level %, AHT, and Occupancy % across the 24 intervals.

task_completion.description: Highlight Service Level values below 80% with a red fill
task_completion.visual_evidence: On the 'Interval_Data' sheet, cells in the Service Level column containing values less than 80% (or 0.8) have a red background color.

task_completion.description: Calculate the Global Service Level on the 'Daily_Dashboard' sheet
task_completion.visual_evidence: On the 'Daily_Dashboard' sheet, a cell displays the Global Service Level. The value should be approximately 77.39% (0.7739), indicating a weighted average was used.

task_completion.description: Calculate the Global AHT on the 'Daily_Dashboard' sheet
task_completion.visual_evidence: On the 'Daily_Dashboard' sheet, a cell displays the Global AHT. The value should be approximately 425.5, indicating a weighted average was used.

task_completion.description: Calculate the Max Occupancy on the 'Daily_Dashboard' sheet
task_completion.visual_evidence: On the 'Daily_Dashboard' sheet, a cell displays the Max Occupancy, representing the highest interval occupancy calculated from the first sheet.
The agent clicks the save button, uses a save shortcut, or the spreadsheet shows no unsaved changes indicator at the end of the task.

integrity.description: The agent used the spreadsheet GUI to perform the task
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the agent clicking cells, typing formulas in the formula bar, or using spreadsheet formatting tools, rather than running a Python script in a terminal to modify the file.

integrity.description: The agent used formulas for calculations rather than hardcoding answers
integrity.visual_evidence: The formula bar shows spreadsheet formulas (e.g., SUM, MAX, or basic arithmetic like =B2/C2) rather than typed-in static numbers for the final dashboard metrics.

integrity.description: The agent genuinely applied the red fill to the correct cells
integrity.visual_evidence: The agent is seen using the Conditional Formatting menu or manually selecting the correct cells (<80%) and applying a red bucket fill color.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The Global Service Level must be a weighted average (Total SL_Count / Total Offered), resulting in approximately 77.39% (0.7739). The Global AHT must also be a weighted average (Total Work Seconds / Total Answered), resulting in approximately 425.5 seconds. Simple averages of the interval percentages are incorrect and represent a common trap. The dataset contains 24 thirty-minute intervals.
